app.title: FuelTrack
app.fillProfile: Start by filling in your profile

howTo: Unit toggle (top right): switch between metric (kg/cm) and imperial (lb/ft)
Basic Info: enter your weight, height, age, gender, goal, activity level and diet mode
Goal details: if you chose lose or gain, set target weight change and timeline in weeks
Analysis section: see your maintenance TDEE, daily target calories, protein target and macro split
Food Preferences: pick preferred food categories (proteins, veggies, grains, dairy, etc.)
Cooking skill & time: tell the app how much time and skill you have for cooking
Meals per day & snacks: set how many meals and snacks you eat daily (used in meal plans)
Allergies: mark foods you're allergic to — the app will never suggest them
Simple grocery mode: toggle for shorter grocery lists with repeated meals
Exercise Profile: set your level, location (home/gym/outdoor), equipment and limitations
Workout schedule: set frequency (days/week) and session duration
Fitness goals & exercise categories: tell the app what you want to focus on
Language selector: switch between Greek and English
Sign in / Sign out button at the bottom of the tab
tips: The more complete your profile, the better the Coach advice will be
Update your weight regularly in the Summary tab for accurate calorie calculations
Allergies are critical — always double-check this section
Setting realistic weekly rate (e.g. 0.5 kg/week loss) gives healthier results
Diet mode (keto, Mediterranean, etc.) affects macro split and Coach suggestions

howTo: Hero card: greeting, today's date and a Today button if viewing a past day
Calendar icon (📅): log a past day by picking from the custom date picker (future dates are disabled)
Remaining calories: large number showing Target − Food + Exercise
Progress bar: your daily percentage toward the calorie goal
Macro bars: protein, carbs and fat with current values vs targets
Goal & diet mode badge at the bottom of the hero card
Coach: quick questions (meal plan, training plan, weekly review) or your own custom question
Meal Plan: view, expand/collapse, export as PDF or delete your saved plan
Grocery List: generated from your meal plan, export as PDF or delete
Training Plan: view, expand/collapse, export as PDF or delete
Weight tracking: enter today's weight with a date, see last weight and 30-day change
Weight history: view past entries (up to 10) with option to delete
Weight chart: visual trend over time
Streak badge: shows your current logging streak with an emoji
Last 7 Days: expandable rows with remaining, food, exercise, protein, carbs and fat per day
tips: Tap the 📅 icon to log a past day — future dates are disabled
The Coach's Weekly Review scores your week from 1 to 10
The streak rewards you for daily logging — keep it going!
Update your weight regularly for more accurate calorie targets
Tap a day in the 7-day history to see all its macros expanded

howTo: Food of the Day: total calories at top, grouped by meal (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Snacks)
Edit or delete any entry directly from the list
Photo analyzer (📸): take a photo and it recognizes the food and estimates calories
Barcode scanner (🔲): scan a product's barcode to add it instantly
Filter buttons: All, High Protein, Low Carb, Low Cal, Keto
Search box: type to find foods in the database (Greek and English)
Search results show name, brand, source badge and a star for favoriting
Add Food modal: choose portion or grams, quantity, meal category — see macros preview
Favorites card: one-tap add from your starred foods
Recent foods card: quick re-add from your last additions
Custom food form: create your own food with calories, protein, carbs, fat per 100g
Saved custom foods appear in their own list for reuse
tips: Favorites appear at the top for fastest adding
Recent foods are saved automatically — no need to search again
Photo analyzer uses smart vision — works best with clear photos
Adjust grams or portion before adding to get accurate calories
Custom foods are handy for homemade recipes you log often

howTo: Exercise of the Day: total calories burned and a list of all exercises logged today
Delete any exercise directly from the list
Apple Health / Google Fit buttons: connect to auto-import workouts (when available)
Search box: type to find exercises from the library
Category filters: All, Cardio 🏃, Gym 🏋️, Training 🔥, Sports ⚽
Exercise dropdown: shows calories per minute next to each exercise
Star button: mark an exercise as favorite for quick access later
Exercise selection card: set minutes with +/− buttons, see calorie preview
Favorites card: one-tap add with a default of 30 minutes
Recent exercises card: re-add your latest workouts
Custom exercise form: create your own with a name, minutes and calories per minute
tips: Exercise calories add back to your remaining calories for the day
Favorites load instantly with 30 minutes set as default
Custom exercises are useful for niche activities not in the library
Recent exercises save you from searching for the same workout twice

welcome.heroSub: Tell me your goal and I'll take it from here — what to eat, what exercise to do, how to get where you want.
welcome.goalFirstDesc: Pick a goal — weight loss, muscle gain or maintenance — and the app auto-adjusts calories, macros and suggestions.
welcome.aiCoachDesc: Ask the coach what to eat now, what workout to do, or request a full meal plan for the day — based on your preferences.
welcome.greekFoodsDesc: Souvlaki, feta, Greek salad, toast — no cups and ounces. Enter "2 medium eggs" and we calculate automatically.
welcome.trackingDesc: By logging your meals and workouts, you see in real time if you're on target. That's what makes the difference.
welcome.fastDesc: Instant search, portions in 1 tap, barcode scanner and photo analysis. No unnecessary clicks.
welcome.formula: Our logic is simple — in calories (kcal):
welcome.formulaHint: Stay within your calorie target and results will follow.

summary.title: Daily summary
summary.plansDisclaimer: General suggestions — not a substitute for a specialist. Consult a doctor if you have conditions or allergies.
summary.noMealPlan: You don't have a meal plan yet. Ask the Coach!
summary.noTrainingPlan: You don't have a training plan yet. Ask the Coach!
summary.groceryReady: Tap "List" to generate a grocery list from your meal plan.
summary.groceryNeedPlan: Ask the Coach for a weekly meal plan first.

food.noFavoritesHint: Search for a food above and tap ☆ to add it. The Coach will use your favorites for more targeted suggestions!
food.name: Name

exercise.noFavoritesHint: Select an exercise from the dropdown and tap ☆ to add it. The Coach will suggest exercises from your favorites!

profile.title: Profile
profile.fillProfileDesc: Enter your basic info so we can calculate your daily calorie target.
profile.autoAdjust: The app automatically adjusts your calories
profile.unrealisticGoal: Unrealistic goal. Try more weeks or a smaller target.
profile.exerciseSuggestion: To reach your goal, add ~{{calories}} kcal/day of exercise ({{example}}).
profile.loginHint: Sign in to back up your data and unlock Pro features

barcode.title: Barcode Scanner
barcode.updateRequired: Barcode scanning requires an updated version of the app. Please reinstall FuelTrack from fueltrack.me.
barcode.installing: Setting up barcode scanner for first use...

photo.title: Food analysis
photo.cameraNotSupported: Camera not available on this browser.
photo.updateRequired: The camera feature requires an updated version of the app. Please reinstall FuelTrack from fueltrack.me.

nativeStale.title: App update required
nativeStale.body: Your installed app is missing native components ({{plugins}}). Some features will not work until you reinstall FuelTrack from fueltrack.me.

googleFit.hint: Reads steps and calories automatically · In testing phase
googleFit.title: Google Fit

aiCoach.title: Coach
aiCoach.subtitle: Nutritionist & Personal Trainer
aiCoach.proDesc: The Coach is available with a Pro account. Upgrade to get personalized nutrition and training advice.
aiCoach.freeNote: Free accounts include limited Coach requests. Upgrade to Pro for full access.
aiCoach.needsAccountDesc: Sign up to use the Coach — it's free!
aiCoach.limitDesc: You've used all {{limit}} Coach requests for today. Try again tomorrow!
aiCoach.monthlyLimitDesc: You've reached the monthly limit of {{limit}} queries. Resets next month.
aiCoach.lifetimeLimitDesc: You've used all {{limit}} free Coach requests. Upgrade to Pro for continued access.
aiCoach.paidLimitDesc: You've used all {{limit}} Coach requests for this month. Resets next month.
aiCoach.paidLimitExtra: Need more? You can add an extra 500 requests/month for just €2.99.
aiCoach.upgradeHint: Upgrade to Pro (€2.99/month) for 500 Coach requests per month!
aiCoach.prefsHintDesc: For tailored suggestions, go to the Profile tab and fill in your food preferences, fitness profile, and personal details.
aiCoach.askAnything: Ask me anything or tap for a quick analysis:
aiCoach.q3: How am I doing this week?

modeDescriptions.mediterranean: Mediterranean diet — olive oil, fish, vegetables
modeDescriptions.keto: Ketogenic — very low carbs, high fat
modeDescriptions.vegetarian: No meat — with eggs and dairy

planChooser.title: Welcome to FuelTrack!
planChooser.subtitle: Choose your plan to get started

auth.subtitle: Plan → Track → Achieve!
auth.name: Your name
auth.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.intro: We sent you a confirmation link. Click it to activate your account and start using FuelTrack.
verifyEmail.spamHint: No email yet? Check your spam / promotions folder. Delivery usually takes less than a minute.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Email sent again. Check your inbox.
verifyEmail.resendError: Could not resend email. Try again in a bit.
verifyEmail.notYetError: Your email is not verified yet. Click the link we sent you first.

foodPrefs.title: Food Profile
foodPrefs.subtitle: Tap what you like — helps the Coach give you better suggestions
foodPrefs.simpleGroceriesDesc: Repeats meals during the week so the grocery list stays relatively short

exercisePrefs.title: Exercise Profile
exercisePrefs.subtitle: Helps the Coach suggest exercises suitable for you
